scripts.publish:major: cd packages/create-vibekit-app && pnpm build && pnpm version major && pnpm publish
scripts.publish:minor: cd packages/create-vibekit-app && pnpm build && pnpm version minor && pnpm publish
scripts.publish:patch: cd packages/create-vibekit-app && pnpm build && pnpm version patch && pnpm publish
